creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
Created attachment 192523
Proposed patch (since 466363 revision)

Patch to update editors/focuswriter port from 1.6.11 to 1.6.12 version.

Look following links for changes:
https://github.com/gottcode/focuswriter/compare/v1.6.11...v1.6.12
https://github.com/gottcode/focuswriter/blob/v1.6.12/NEWS#L1-L5

Some solutions related to icons cache on GTK+ environment was explained on bug 227142 comment #5.

The build was tested on FreeBSD 10.3 amd64.
